title: My city
passage:
Do you live in a nice place? I do! The city (27) ___ I live is called Bristol, and it's in the south-west of England. It's not very big, but there are loads of things for teenagers to do here.

(28) ___ you're interested in television, you should go to the Bristol TV and Radio Studios. On the tour of the studios, you can have a go at presenting and appear (29) ___ your own radio drama.

Or if you're into sport, why (30) ___ try canoeing? The best place is a very pretty local section of the Kennet and Avon canal. It connects Bristol to London and it (31) ___ built in the early 18th century, so you can experience some local history at the same time.

These are just two (32) ___ the many things you can do here. It really is a great place.

questions.explanation: Dùng mệnh đề quan hệ chỉ nơi chốn: "the city where I live" = thành phố nơi tôi sống.
Câu điều kiện loại 1 dạng gợi ý: "If you're interested..., you should..." = Nếu bạn thích..., bạn nên...
Collocation: "appear in" (xuất hiện trong) + chương trình/vở kịch: "appear in your own radio drama".
Cụm cố định gợi ý: "Why not + V...?" = Sao không thử...?: "why not try canoeing?".
Bị động quá khứ vì nói về thời điểm xây: "it was built" (được xây).
Cấu trúc chỉ một phần trong tổng thể: "two of the many things" = hai trong số rất nhiều thứ.

title: A wildlife boat tour
passage:
When I was on holiday with my parents, we went on a wildlife tour. The trip involved sailing round some islands off the coast, not too far (27) ___ our hotel. Some other guests had been on the tour, and recommended it to my parents, who immediately decided we should go.

In the morning our guide, Jake, picked us (28) ___ in his boat and off we went. Jake knew lots about the wildlife on the islands and we saw everything we were hoping to, apart from one bird, called a harrier, which didn't appear. But that didn't matter (29) ___ we saw many other amazing birds.

My parents especially liked the fact that (30) ___ were very few people on the tour. Jake had time to answer all our questions, so we felt we learnt (31) ___ than we'd expected. And we agreed this wildlife experience was (32) ___ of the best we'd ever had.

questions.explanation: Giới từ đi với "far": "not too far from" = không quá xa (so với) khách sạn.
Phrasal verb: "pick someone up" = đón ai: "picked us up".
Liên từ chỉ nguyên nhân: "didn't matter because...". (Có thể dùng "as/since" cũng đúng).
Cấu trúc tồn tại: "there were very few people" = có rất ít người.
So sánh hơn với "than": "learnt more than we'd expected" = học được nhiều hơn mong đợi.
Cấu trúc: "one of the best" = một trong những điều tuyệt nhất.

title: School Jazz Band
passage:
Do you play a jazz instrument - maybe the trumpet, guitar or drums? Do you want to have some musical fun with other students in the school (27) ___ have similar interests to yours? If you do, come and join us on Tuesdays after school in the music room.

At the moment, there are eight of us playing quite a wide range of instruments. We're having such (28) ___ great time and Mr Jones is an amazing jazz teacher, but we need more people, especially electric guitarists!

We're hoping (29) ___ perform in the end-of-term show and Mr Jones said he'll deal (30) ___ all the technical arrangements and the sound system, which is great!

Either come and ask me (31) ___ more details during one of the lunch breaks (32) ___ just turn up on the day. But don't forget to bring your instrument! See you there!

questions.explanation: Đại từ quan hệ chỉ người: "students who...". (Có thể dùng "that" cũng đúng).
Cấu trúc: "such a + adj + noun" → "such a great time".
Cấu trúc: "hope to + V" = hy vọng sẽ làm gì: "hoping to perform".
Collocation: "deal with" = xử lý/lo liệu: "deal with all the technical arrangements".
Collocation: "ask (someone) for" = hỏi xin: "ask me for more details".
Cặp liên từ: "Either ... or ..." = hoặc ... hoặc ...: "Either ... or just turn up".

title: A trip to the theatre
passage: We had a class day out today. We went on a theatre trip (27) ___ see Shakespeare's play Hamlet. A friend of mine, (28) ___ has always been really into Shakespeare, had already told me the story. Basically, Hamlet discovers a terrible secret about his family, but he can't decide (29) ___ to do about it. I won't say any more about the story, in case you decide to go and see it as well. I'd hate to spoil it for you! The only thing I didn't like about the play was (30) ___ fact that it lasted four hours. For me, that was far (31) ___ long, and the seats were quite uncomfortable. Afterwards, my mum asked me (32) ___ I'd go and see another Shakespeare play. I said yes, I probably would, but I'd take a cushion next time!

questions.explanation: Mục đích: "trip to see" = chuyến đi để xem (to + V).
Mệnh đề quan hệ chỉ người sau dấu phẩy (non-defining): "a friend of mine, who...".
Cụm cố định: "decide what to do" = quyết định nên làm gì.
Cụm cố định: "the fact that ..." = việc rằng...
"too + adj" diễn tả quá mức: "too long" = quá dài.
Sau "asked me" dùng "if" để tường thuật câu hỏi Yes/No. (Có thể dùng "whether" cũng đúng).

title: Moving house
passage:
Hi Alex,

How are you? This week's been a very busy one for me - I finally moved house!

(27) ___ wasn't until I started to pack a few days ago that I realised how much stuff I had. I really think moving house is one of the (28) ___ stressful things I've ever done! I was sad to leave my old house - after (29) ___, I'd lived there my whole life so I have lots of good memories.

Anyway, I'm looking (30) ___ to being in this new house. It's not as big as the old one, but (31) ___ least it's got a great garden. I'm planning to have a small party on Saturday night. Are you free then? Why don't you come along (32) ___ you are? I hope you can make it. Let me know.

All the best,

Sam

questions.explanation: Cấu trúc nhấn mạnh: **It wasn't until ... that ...** = Mãi đến khi ... thì ...; cần chủ ngữ giả **It**, không dùng 'This/That'.
Cấu trúc cố định: **one of the most + adj + plural noun** -> 'one of the **most** stressful things'.
Cụm cố định: **after all** = dù sao thì/đằng nào thì; 'after all, I'd lived there my whole life'.
Collocation: **look forward to + V-ing** (to là giới từ) -> 'looking **forward** to being'.
Cụm cố định: **at least** = ít nhất thì; không dùng 'in/on least'.
Câu mời theo điều kiện: **come along if you are (free)** = nếu bạn rảnh thì đến nhé; hợp ngữ cảnh hỏi 'Are you free then?'

title: My travel blog
passage:
This summer, I travelled to Copenhagen, the capital of Denmark, on my own. I am only 20 and to (27) ___ honest, I was nervous about exploring a new city alone. I decided to go on a free walking tour the first day I was there. I hoped the tour would help me to become more familiar (28) ___ the city.

Unfortunately, the weather wasn't great, but the tour was still absolutely fantastic! Magnus, our tour guide, knew all about the city's history. We also learnt loads (29) ___ interesting facts about Danish culture. At the end of the tour, he gave (30) ___ all suggestions for the best places (31) ___ eat and visit.

Apart from learning so much, I actually had a lot more fun on the walking tour (32) ___ I'd expected. It was an excellent way to experience the city, and learn about its culture and history.

questions.explanation: Cụm cố định: **to be honest** = nói thật là; sau 'to' dùng **be**.
Collocation: **(become) familiar with** something = trở nên quen thuộc với; không dùng 'familiar to' trong nghĩa này.
Cụm cố định: **learn loads of + noun** = học được rất nhiều; 'loads **of** interesting facts'.
Cấu trúc: **give + somebody + something** -> 'gave **us** all suggestions' (gave us advice/suggestions).
Dạng rút gọn mệnh đề sau danh từ chỉ mục đích: **places to eat and visit** = những nơi để ăn và tham quan.
So sánh hơn: **more ... than** -> 'a lot more fun ... **than** I'd expected'.

title: Starting at college
passage:
Hi, my name's Emma. Welcome to the college! I've been studying here for a year now. Starting at college isn't easy, but I'm sure you'll soon feel at home. When I first started studying here last year, I was (27) ___ nervous that I couldn't even ask anyone for help. I got lost five times on my first day!

Remember that (28) ___ student at the college has been new at one time, and understands how you feel. So (29) ___ you're not sure where to go, just ask - we're all happy to help!

You probably don't know many people here. To make some friends, (30) ___ not spend break times with some of your new classmates in the café? Or how (31) ___ joining one of the many clubs we have at the college? (32) ___ are lots to choose from.

Good luck on your new course!

questions.explanation: Cấu trúc kết quả: **so + adj + that + clause** -> 'so nervous that I couldn't...'.
Ý nghĩa khái quát: **every/each student** = mọi sinh viên; đều đúng ngữ pháp trong câu này.
Liên từ chỉ tình huống: **if/when/whenever you're not sure** = nếu/khi/bất cứ khi nào bạn không chắc; đều phù hợp nghĩa khuyên 'cứ hỏi'.
Câu gợi ý: **Why not + V (bare infinitive)?** -> 'Why not spend...?'.
Cấu trúc gợi ý: **How about + V-ing?** -> 'How about joining...?'.
Cấu trúc tồn tại: **There are + plural noun** -> 'There are lots to choose from'.

title: Piano lessons
passage:
From: Harry
To: Oliver
Subject: Piano lessons

Hi Oliver,

Guess what? I've finally started piano lessons, like you! As you know, it's something I've wanted to do ever (27) ___. I was young. Anyway, a couple of months ago I saw someone playing the piano on TV - he was brilliant. And when I found out he'd only started playing quite recently, that encouraged (28) ___ to start lessons.

I've got a really good teacher, and I go to her house twice a week (29) ___ lessons. She's very patient. Every time I make a mistake, she explains what I did wrong. Also, I couldn't read music when I started. It's been hard to learn to read the notes on the page and decide which piano keys to use at the (30) ___ time! But when I finally play something that other people recognise, it really makes me happy. Maybe (31) ___ day, I'll become even better (32) ___ you are at playing the piano!

questions.explanation: Cụm cố định: **ever since** = từ khi... đến giờ; 'ever since I was young'.
Động từ cần tân ngữ: **encourage somebody to do** -> 'encouraged **me** to start lessons'.
Mục đích: **go (somewhere) for lessons** = đến ... để học; không dùng 'to lessons' ở cấu trúc này.
Cụm cố định: **at the same time** = cùng lúc; cần 'same'.
Cụm nói về tương lai: **one day / some day** = một ngày nào đó; cả hai đều chấp nhận.
So sánh hơn: **better than** -> 'even better **than** you are'.
